display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Very Hot Cocoa
wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Very Hot Cocoa|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Energy|2}}
{{R|Very Hot Cocoa||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.
== Sources ==
Can be offered at the start of [[StS2:Acts#Act 2|Act 2]] by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because '''Very Hot Cocoa''' shares a relic pool with {{R|Nutritious Soup||2}} and {{R|Yummy Cookie||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Tezcatara||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
*'''Very Hot Cocoa''' can compensate for {{KW|Energy||2}} loss on turn 1 due to {{R|Bread||2}}.
*Relics that draw an additional card(s) (such as {{R|Bag of Preparation||2}}, or correctly timed {{R|Pendulum||2}}) on turn 1 can provide more ways to spend {{KW|Energy||2}} provided by '''Very Hot Cocoa'''.
===Anti-Synergies===
*{{R|Big Mushroom||2}}'s draw reduction on turn 1 can make it harder to spend {{KW|Energy||2}} provided by '''Very Hot Cocoa'''.
== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Very Hot Cocoa to the game.
